title: Samsung, Amazon, Microsoft, Meta, Microsoft again
excerpt: The thing nobody tells you about changing companies is that you keep arriving as a beginner.

title: The authentication problem in a virtual room
excerpt: When you put on a VR headset, the familiar anchor points disappear.

title: The first Copilot feature nobody saw
excerpt: We shipped a voice assistant into Outlook in 2021 that almost no one used.

title: What I got wrong about being a manager the first time
excerpt: The first team I managed had four people on it.

title: Being inside a company when it decides to change direction
excerpt: In early 2020, we were building a voice assistant for Outlook. Nobody called it an AI feature yet.

title: The year I stopped writing code
excerpt: Somewhere in my second month as a manager, I opened my laptop on a Sunday morning with the intention of writing a small script.

title: What it felt like to ship to five million people
excerpt: The dashboard loaded the same way it always did, slow on the first refresh, faster on the second.

title: Building voice on a phone with bad signal
excerpt: The assumption baked into every voice assistant I had ever used was that the connection was good.

title: The patent that started as a side project
excerpt: It started because phone notifications were bothering me.
